notes:
PR #10 opened: https://github.com/4466hikaru/claude-code-slack-channel/pull/10

実装完了 — Phase 2A loader 単体:
- scripts/lib/project-channel-registry.ts 新規 (loadActiveProjectChannels + ActiveProjectChannel + RegistryLoadResult)
- scripts/lib/project-channel-registry.test.ts 新規 (25 test / 75 expects)
- docs/inbound-auto-processing.md に Phase 2A loader section 追加、watcher 未接続を明記

263 pass / 0 fail / 746 expect (+25/+75 from PR #9 baseline)、tsc 0、biome clean、pre-commit/pre-push green。

Hard contracts: pure (no Slack API / no state write / no cache)、never throws (= counter で報告)、queue file が唯一 SoT、backward compatible。

watcher polling loop / multi-channel polling / last-ts persistence / route wire-up / Slack channel 作成 API すべて触らず。Phase 2B / 2C で別 PR 配線予定。

bd 指示通り PR 作成後に close、URL は本 notes に記録済。merge 判断は Hikaru / Codex。
Codex review fix applied (commit ddbf6f6):

問題: scripts/lib/project-channel-registry.ts が ../inbound-watcher から parseFrontmatterFile を import していた。Phase 2B/2C で inbound-watcher → registry を導入予定なので循環依存を作る。

修正 (A 案):
- 新 module scripts/lib/frontmatter.ts に共有 helpers を抽出 (= escapeYamlString / unescapeYamlString / serializeFrontmatter / parseFrontmatterFile + Frontmatter / FrontmatterValue types、verbatim、no behavior change)
- scripts/inbound-watcher.ts: 定義削除、./lib/frontmatter から import + re-export で back-compat 維持
- scripts/lib/project-channel-registry.ts: import を ./frontmatter に変更 (= sibling within scripts/lib/、inbound-watcher 依存ゼロ)

既存の executor-relay / outbox → inbound-watcher cycle は out of scope (= 既知の別 follow-up)。

verification: registry test 25 pass / 全 scripts test 263 pass / 0 fail / 746 expect / tsc 0 / biome clean / pre-commit + pre-push green。

PR body にも 'Codex review fix: remove registry -> inbound-watcher dependency / avoid future import cycle' section を REST PATCH で追加済 (body length 7743)。Codex 再レビュー待ち。

title: feat(watcher): project channel model Phase 1 — queue schema + channel inbound routing
description:
## Goal

Project channel model design (= `hikaru-agent-knowledge` PR #28 `9887170` + PR #29 `4fe56a9` で main 入り、`docs/issue-drafts/new-project-channel-model.md`) の **Phase 1 実装**。

実装対象は **2 stream** に分かれる:

1. **queue file schema 拡張** (= `[新規]` / `/new-project` で write される `handoff/project-requests/<id>.md` の frontmatter に project channel / source / template fields を追加)
2. **prefix routing 拡張** (= project channel から来た inbound に対する分類処理: non-emergency → warning + DM 誘導、`[abort]` → global abort 即処理、`[abort-test]` / `[abort cleanup]` は DM 限定維持)

⚠ **Slack channel 作成 API には進まない** (= Phase A、channel 作成は Hikaru 手動)、watcher が `conversations.create` / `conversations.invite` を呼ぶ実装は **本 Phase の scope 外** (= 別 Phase / 別 design)。

新 mechanism は作らない、既存 watcher (= `scripts/inbound-watcher.ts`、Phase 1 codex-review queue / executor completion relay / `[新規]` queue を実装している) の延長線として **frontmatter field + prefix subroutine** を足す delta 実装。

## Files to touch

| file | 操作 | 内容 |
|---|---|---|
| `scripts/inbound-watcher.ts` | 修正 | (1) `[新規]` / `/new-project` queue file write 時に新 frontmatter field 7 件を追加、Phase 1 では全て **null / default** で write (2) project channel inbound 識別 + 分類処理 subroutine 追加 (= non-emergency warning / `[abort]` global abort / approve 系 / DM-only ops) |
| `scripts/inbound-watcher.test.ts` | 修正 / 追加 | 下記 Tests を追加 |
| `docs/inbound-auto-processing.md` | 修正 | project channel inbound の分類処理 + queue file schema 拡張を追記、既存 ops prefix routing と区別明記 |

**触らない** (= scope 外):

- 既存 `[abort]` flag file mechanism 自体 (= `handoff/abort-lv2` の touch / rm / 解釈は不変、本 Phase は **受領経路を project channel にも拡張** する wrapper のみ)
- 既存 `[abort-test]` / `[abort cleanup]` の DM 経由動作 (= 不変、channel 経路は本 Phase 範囲外)
- 既存 `[codex-review]` (= `ccsc-9hm` 既往実装) / executor completion relay (= `ccsc-sbf`) / approved dispatch (= `ccsc-81q`) の挙動
- 既存 `from-execute/` の done / result / propose / progress / ask routing
- `dialogue-*` agent 起動 routing (= 相談役 session の `CLAUDE.md` 駆動、bridge 側 touch 不要)
- approved dispatch outbox / G2 W1-W3 / Phase 4-5 design (= 別 stream)
- bridge auth / token 関連
- **Slack channel 作成 API** (= `conversations.create` / `conversations.invite` 不触、Phase A の Hikaru 手動作成前提)

## Requirements

### Part A: queue file schema 拡張 (= `[新規]` / `/new-project` queue 起票時)

#### 追加 frontmatter field 7 件 (= 全 flat YAML、既存軽量 parser 互換)

```yaml
# === project channel model (= 新規追加、Phase 1 では全 null/default で write) ===
project_channel_id: null                # = Slack channel ID (C... 形式)、Phase 2 で Hikaru が手動作成後に埋める、Phase 1 では null 固定
project_channel_name: null              # = "proj-<project_name>" 形式、Phase 2 で埋める
source_channel_id: <inbound chat_id>    # = inbound DM / channel の chat_id、既存 slack_chat_id と同じ値だが project channel model 用 re-tagging
source_channel_type: dm | project-channel | unknown
                                        # = dm: D... 形式 → "dm"
                                        # = project-channel: C... 形式 + known project channel → "project-channel" (= Phase 1 では未登録なので通常 dm)
                                        # = unknown: 判定不能 (= 想定外、reject 推奨)
template_source: blank                  # = blank default、Phase 2 brief 起草時に tracaverse / other に変更可
reference_repo: null                    # = 例 '4466hikaru/tracaverse'、Phase 2 brief で埋める
target_repo_name: null                  # = Phase 2 brief で project_name から導出、queue file レベルでも保持
```

#### source_channel_type の判定ロジック (= Phase 1 watcher で実装)

- `chat_id` が `D` で始まる → `source_channel_type: dm`
- `chat_id` が `C` で始まる → `source_channel_type: project-channel` (= Phase 1 では known channel registry を持たないので、すべての C... を `project-channel` 扱い、Phase 2 以降で queue file の `project_channel_id` 照合に拡張可)
- 上記いずれにも該当しない (= G... group channel 等) → `source_channel_type: unknown`

⚠ **判定は文字 prefix 1 文字のみ** (= heuristic、Slack の正式 channel type 判定 API は呼ばない、Phase B 自動化時に refine)。

#### 既存 field との関係

既存軽量 parser は **未知 field を無視**、必須 field 欠落で reject する仕様 (= 既存 codex-review queue / executor relay / approved dispatch と整合)。新 7 field 全てが **null / default 許容**、watcher は新 field の存在を check しない。よって既存 queue file 読み込み路に regression なし。

### Part B: prefix routing 拡張 (= project channel inbound 処理)

#### B1: non-emergency ops (= `status?` / `prs?` / `pending?` / `[abort-test]` / `[abort cleanup]` / `[整理]` / `[tech]` / `[product]` / `[bizdev]` / `[marketing]` / `[ops]` / `[brainstorm]`)

- project channel (= `chat_id` が C... or G... = DM ではない) で打たれた場合の動作:
  1. **subagent dispatch / status 集計 / counter 更新 を実行しない**
  2. **1 行 warning reply (= 同 thread)**: 「`<prefix>` は DM で打ってください、channel では受領しません」
  3. log に `non-emergency ops in non-DM channel: prefix=<>, chat_id=<>, ts=<>` を 1 行記録
- DM (= `chat_id` が D...) で打たれた場合は **既存挙動を不変** (= regression なし)

#### B2: emergency production stop `[abort]` (= channel でも即処理、silent ignore 禁止)

- DM / project channel どちらで打たれても **同等の停止 action** を実行 (= DM 打ち直し誘導なし、fallback 検討なし)
- 動作 3 step (= project channel で打たれた場合):
  1. `touch /home/hikaru/projects/hikaru-agent-knowledge/handoff/abort-lv2` (= 既存 abort flag、DM `[abort]` と完全に同じ操作、新 flag mechanism は作らない)
  2. **channel に reply (= 同 thread)**: 「`global abort active` — `handoff/abort-lv2` 作成済、全 wake 停止。再開は DM で `[abort cleanup]`」
  3. **DM `D0B2GN71MNE` にも reply**: 「project channel `<#channel_id>` で `[abort]` 受領 → `global abort active`」 (= dual notify)
- bare `[abort]` 受領 OK (= 復唱 phrase 不要、即応性最優先)
- 大文字小文字区別なし (= `[ABORT]` / `[Abort]` も同等扱い、既存 routing と整合)
- **known / unknown channel の区別なし** (= Phase 1 では known channel registry を持たない、全 channel `[abort]` を同等 safe default で処理、Hikaru の緊急性を尊重)

#### B3: `[abort-test]` / `[abort cleanup]` (= DM 限定維持)

- project channel で打たれた場合: B1 の non-emergency ops 扱い (= warning + DM 誘導)
- 既存 DM 経由動作は **完全に不変**

#### B4: approve 系 (= `approve <request_id>` / `approve-impl <request_id>` / `cancel <request_id>` / `cancel-impl <request_id>`)

- 本 Phase 1 では **実装範囲外** (= Phase 2a runbook PR #27 の手動運用で扱う、bridge auto-handle は Phase 2b/2c)
- ただし project channel から approve 系が来ても **bridge level で reject しない** (= 相談役 session 側で読み取る前提、bridge は post-through)

### Part C: malformed / token handling (= 既存ルール継承)

- inbound message body / frontmatter に token-like 文字列 (= `Bearer ` / `xoxb-` / `xapp-` / `sk-` prefix) → **queue file には sanitize 後 write、Slack ack に「token-like 検出、sanitize 済」追記** (= 既存 codex-review queue / executor relay と同方針)
- queue file write 失敗 (= disk error) → Slack に error 通知 + retry なし
- malformed source_channel_type (= 判定不能) → queue file write は実施 (= `source_channel_type: unknown`)、Slack ack に「source channel 不明、Hikaru 確認推奨」追記

### 既存 prefix routing 非干渉

- 既存 `[abort]` / `[abort-test]` / `[abort cleanup]` / `status?` / `prs?` / `pending?` / `[codex-review]` / `OK` / `approve` / `cancel` の **DM 経由動作は完全不変** (= regression test 必須)
- 既存 `from-execute/` の done / result / propose / progress / ask routing にも touch しない
- 本 Phase は **project channel inbound 経路を追加** + queue file schema 拡張、既存経路を変更しない

## Tests

### Part A (= queue schema)

- **DM 起票時**: `/new-project` `[新規]` を D... 経由で投入 → queue file frontmatter に 7 新 field 含まれる、`source_channel_type: dm` / 他 6 field null/default
- **(将来想定) project channel 起票時**: C... 経由で投入 → `source_channel_type: project-channel`、他 6 field null/default (= Phase 1 で実装、Phase 2 で活用)
- **unknown channel 起票時**: G... 経由で投入 → `source_channel_type: unknown` + Slack ack に「source channel 不明」追記
- **token-like sanitize**: body に `Bearer xoxb-...` → queue file には `<redacted-token>` で保存、ack に検出 1 行
- **既存 queue file parse**: 旧 schema queue file (= 7 新 field なし) → 既存軽量 parser で reject されない (= backward compatibility)

### Part B (= prefix routing)

- **DM 経由 `status?`**: 既存挙動どおり status 返信 (= regression なし)
- **project channel `status?`**: subagent dispatch / 集計なし、warning + DM 誘導 reply 1 行
- **DM 経由 `[abort]`**: 既存挙動どおり `handoff/abort-lv2` touch + DM reply (= regression なし)
- **project channel `[abort]`**: `handoff/abort-lv2` touch + channel reply + DM reply (= dual notify、§B2 全 step)
- **project channel bare `[abort]`**: 復唱 phrase なしで上記成立
- **project channel `[ABORT]` / `[Abort]`**: 大文字小文字混在で上記成立
- **project channel `[abort-test]`**: warning + DM 誘導 reply (= B3、DM 限定維持の証明)
- **project channel `[abort cleanup]`**: warning + DM 誘導 reply (= B3)
- **DM 経由 `[abort-test]` / `[abort cleanup]`**: 既存挙動どおり (= regression なし)
- **project channel `approve <request_id>`**: bridge は post-through (= reject しない、相談役 session 側読み取り前提、§B4)
- **idempotency**: 同 Slack message_id を 2 度処理 → queue 起票は 1 度のみ、`[abort]` global abort も flag は冪等 (= 既に存在する flag を二重 touch しても害なし、Slack reply は重複 OK)

### Part C (= token handling)

- **token sanitize**: 上記 Part A test 同様、Slack ack / log に raw 値出さず

### Regression

- 既存 `[codex-review]` queue 経路 (= `ccsc-9hm`)
- 既存 executor completion relay (= `ccsc-sbf`)
- 既存 approved dispatch (= `ccsc-81q`)
- 既存 `from-execute/` 経路
- 既存 `[abort]` / `[abort-test]` / `[abort cleanup]` の DM 経由動作
- 既存 `status?` / `prs?` / `pending?` の DM 経由動作

## Safety / Hard rules

- ❌ `git push origin main` 禁止 (= protection L1)
- ❌ `gh pr merge` 禁止 (= Hikaru gate)
- ❌ destructive command 禁止 (`rm -rf` / `git push --force` / `git reset --hard` / `git commit --amend` / branch protection bypass)
- ❌ subagent 再帰禁止 (= max depth 1)
- ❌ `.env` / token / API key / SSH key を test fixture / commit / log raw に含めない
- ❌ queue file frontmatter / body の **token-like 文字列** を Slack ack / log に raw で出さない (= sanitize 必須)
- ❌ 既存 `from-execute/` / `from-consult/` / `from-codex/` / `codex-review-queue/` 経路に touch しない
- ❌ 既存 ops prefix (`[abort]` / `[abort-test]` / `[abort cleanup]` / `status?` / `prs?` / `pending?` / `[codex-review]` / `OK` / `approve` / `cancel`) の **DM 経由動作を変えない**
- ❌ approved dispatch (= `ccsc-81q`) outbox / bare OK gate に **触らない**
- ❌ executor completion relay (= `ccsc-sbf`) の done file 経路に **触らない**
- ❌ **Slack channel 作成 API** (= `conversations.create` / `conversations.invite` / `conversations.archive`) **不触** (= Phase A、Hikaru 手動作成前提)
- ❌ Slack channel state subscribe (= `channel.archived` event) 不触
- ❌ `[abort-test]` / `[abort cleanup]` の **channel 経路拡張なし** (= DM 限定維持、将来別 design)
- ❌ approve 系 (`approve` / `approve-impl` / `cancel` / `cancel-impl`) の **bridge auto-handle なし** (= Phase 2a runbook の手動運用継続、bridge は post-through)
- ❌ arbitrary command 実行なし (= queue file は通知 / state 用、code execution / shell trigger なし)
- ❌ merge / deploy 自動化なし
- ❌ 新 npm dependency 追加は Codex / Hikaru 事前確認必須
- ❌ G2 W1-W3 関連 file (= Tailscale / bridge SSE / G2 web app) に touch しない
- ✅ `handoff/abort-lv2` の touch / rm 自体は **既存 ops と完全同一**、本 Phase は **受領経路を project channel にも拡張** する wrapper のみ
- ✅ queue file write は `handoff/project-requests/` 配下のみ
- ✅ acceptance criteria の test 全件 green を完了報告前に必ず確認
- ✅ feature branch + PR-only 提出

## Timeout / fallback

- **timeout: 90 min** (= 既存 watcher への subroutine 追加 + queue schema 拡張 + sanitize + tests + doc)
- 時間超過時 (= **WIP push 必須、stranded 禁止**):
  1. WIP branch を `git push -u origin <branch>` で push (= 必須)
  2. bd issue を `status: blocked` に update、blocked reason 追記
  3. **draft PR を出す** または最低でも push 済 commit SHA + blocked reason を `handoff/from-execute/<id>.md` (= `type: progress`、本 issue とは別 file、`status: blocked`) で報告
  4. 「未 push のまま終了」禁止
- 想定外 (= 既存 watcher 構造との互換性破壊 / 既存 routing への影響発見) → 本 Phase 中断、design doc を読み直して整合確認、Codex / Hikaru に escalate

## Out of scope

- ❌ **Slack channel 作成 API** (= `conversations.create` / `conversations.invite`、Phase B 自動化で別 PR / 別 bd issue)
- ❌ channel state subscribe (= `channel.archived` event)
- ❌ approve 系 prefix (= `approve` / `approve-impl` / `cancel` / `cancel-impl`) の **bridge auto-handle** (= Phase 2b/2c で別 bd issue)
- ❌ `[abort-test]` / `[abort cleanup]` の channel 経路拡張 (= DM 限定維持、将来別 design)
- ❌ Phase 2-5 design 実装 (= brief 起草 / impl brief / repo create / initial PR は別 bd issue)
- ❌ executor completion relay の挙動変更 (= `ccsc-sbf` 不変)
- ❌ approved dispatch の挙動変更 (= `ccsc-81q` 不変)
- ❌ codex-review queue の挙動変更 (= `ccsc-9hm` 不変)
- ❌ G2 W2-W3 関連 (= 別 stream)
- ❌ tracaverse 実 fork / clone / 流用 commit (= scaffold 段階、Phase 5 別 bd issue)
- ❌ multi-user channel (= single-Hikaru MVP)
- ❌ `[abort]` flag file mechanism 自体の挙動変更 (= `handoff/abort-lv2` touch / rm 自体は不変、本 Phase は wrapper のみ)
- ❌ token rotation / secret 管理機構
- ❌ Phase 1 watcher (= `[新規]` queue 起票) の **再実装** (= 既存 `ccsc-54g` 実装の延長、新規 mechanism は作らない)

## Branch / PR title

- branch: `feat/project-channel-model-phase1`
- PR title: `feat(watcher): project channel model Phase 1 — queue schema + channel inbound routing`

## Acceptance criteria

### Part A (= queue schema 拡張)

- ✅ `[新規]` / `/new-project` queue file frontmatter に 7 新 field (= `project_channel_id` / `project_channel_name` / `source_channel_id` / `source_channel_type` / `template_source` / `reference_repo` / `target_repo_name`) が含まれる
- ✅ Phase 1 では `project_channel_id` / `project_channel_name` / `reference_repo` / `target_repo_name` は null、`template_source: blank` default
- ✅ `source_channel_type` が chat_id prefix で正しく判定される (= D... → `dm` / C... → `project-channel` / その他 → `unknown`)
- ✅ unknown channel 起票時に Slack ack に「source channel 不明」追記
- ✅ token-like 文字列は sanitize 後に queue file に保存、ack に検出 1 行
- ✅ 既存 schema queue file (= 7 新 field なし) は backward compatible で parse 可

### Part B (= prefix routing)

- ✅ DM 経由 `status?` / `prs?` / `pending?` / `[abort-test]` / `[abort cleanup]` / `[整理]` / `[tech]` / `[product]` / `[codex-review]` / `OK` / `approve` / `cancel` の挙動 **既存と完全同一** (= regression なし)
- ✅ project channel (= C...) 経由 non-emergency ops → subagent dispatch / 集計 / counter 更新なし、warning + DM 誘導 reply、log 記録
- ✅ DM 経由 `[abort]` → 既存挙動どおり `handoff/abort-lv2` touch + DM reply (= regression なし)
- ✅ project channel 経由 `[abort]` → `handoff/abort-lv2` touch + channel reply + DM `D0B2GN71MNE` reply の dual notify
- ✅ project channel 経由 bare `[abort]` / `[ABORT]` / `[Abort]` も上記成立 (= 大文字小文字区別なし)
- ✅ project channel 経由 `[abort-test]` / `[abort cleanup]` → warning + DM 誘導 reply (= B3、DM 限定維持)
- ✅ project channel 経由 approve 系 → bridge は post-through (= reject せず、相談役 session 読み取り前提)
- ✅ idempotency: 同 message_id 2 度処理 → queue 起票 1 度のみ、`[abort]` flag touch は冪等

### General

- ✅ test 全件 green、CI 確認
- ✅ `docs/inbound-auto-processing.md` に project channel inbound 動作追記 + queue file schema 拡張追記
- ✅ Slack channel 作成 API なし (= `conversations.create` / `conversations.invite` 不触)
- ✅ `[abort]` flag file mechanism 自体の挙動 不変 (= `handoff/abort-lv2` touch / rm は既存 ops と同一、本 Phase は wrapper のみ)
- ✅ approved dispatch / executor completion relay / codex-review queue / G2 / Phase 2-5 design 不変

## depends_on

- ✅ Phase 0 design (= `hikaru-agent-knowledge` PR #28 `9887170` + PR #29 `4fe56a9`) merged (= `docs/issue-drafts/new-project-channel-model.md` main 入り)
- ✅ Phase 1 queue 起票 (= `[新規]` / `/new-project` watcher、bd `ccsc-54g`) merged (= `claude-code-slack-channel` PR #8) — 本 Phase は **その schema 拡張**
- 既存 watcher (`scripts/inbound-watcher.ts`) working (= regression baseline)
- 既存 `handoff/project-requests/` archive convention working

## References

- `hikaru-agent-knowledge` PR #28 (= channel model design 初版 + Round 2、`9887170`)
- `hikaru-agent-knowledge` PR #29 (= channel model Round 3 follow-up、`4fe56a9`)
- `hikaru-agent-knowledge/docs/issue-drafts/new-project-channel-model.md` (= design SoT)
- `hikaru-agent-knowledge/docs/issue-drafts/new-project-bootstrap-from-g2.md` (= Phase 0 design、`5d45baa`)
- `hikaru-agent-knowledge/docs/issue-drafts/new-project-bootstrap-phase2-brief.md` (= Phase 2 design、`7bb7135`)
- `hikaru-agent-knowledge/docs/issue-drafts/new-project-bootstrap-phase3-brief-to-execution.md` (= Phase 3 design、`ebec6ba`)
- `hikaru-agent-knowledge/docs/runbooks/new-project-phase2-manual-brief.md` (= Phase 2a runbook、`ad3f939`)
- `hikaru-agent-knowledge/handoff/from-consult/new-project-bootstrap-phase1-bd-issue.md` / `*-description.md` (= bd `ccsc-54g`、`[新規]` queue 起票実装、本 Phase の前提)
- `hikaru-agent-knowledge/docs/issue-drafts/codex-review-queue-phase1.md` / `phase2-status.md` (= 軽量 parser pattern / idempotency / token reject の reference)

title: feat(watcher): add /new-project prefix → project-requests/ queue (Phase 1)
description:
## Goal

Phase 0 design (= `hikaru-agent-knowledge/docs/issue-drafts/new-project-bootstrap-from-g2.md`、PR #23) の **Phase 1** = G2 / mobile / Slack 経由で受けた **新規プロジェクト request** を queue file に保存するところまで実装する。

- inbound prefix を bridge watcher で parse
- queue file (= raw 自然文 + meta) を `hikaru-agent-knowledge/handoff/project-requests/<id>.md` に **atomic write**
- Slack 同 thread に ack reply (= queue id + 「Codex brief 生成を待つ」)
- repo 作成 / brief 生成 / Codex dispatch / approved dispatch / 実装には進まない (= 全て **Phase 2+** の責務)

新 mechanism は作らない、既存 watcher (= `scripts/inbound-watcher.ts`) の prefix 振り分け subroutine を 1 つ追加する delta 実装。

## Files to touch

| file | 操作 | 内容 |
|---|---|---|
| `scripts/inbound-watcher.ts` | 修正 | inbound prefix `/new-project` + `[新規]` の handler を追加、queue file write + ack reply、他 prefix 経路には touch しない |
| `scripts/inbound-watcher.test.ts` | 修正 / 追加 | 下記 Tests を追加 |
| `docs/inbound-auto-processing.md` | 修正 | `/new-project` + `[新規]` 動作追記、既存 ops prefix (= `status?` / `[codex-review]` / `[abort]` 等) と区別を明記 |

**触らない** (= scope 外):

- 既存 `from-execute/` の done file / result / propose / progress / ask routing (= 別 stream、Phase 1 では unchanged)
- 既存 ops prefix (= `status?` / `prs?` / `pending?` / `[abort]` / `[abort-test]` / `[abort cleanup]` / `[codex-review]` / `OK` / `approve` / `cancel`) routing 全て (= regression test 必須、変更なし)
- approved dispatch (= `ccsc-81q`) outbox / bare OK gate (= 別 stream、混ぜない)
- executor completion relay (= `ccsc-sbf`) done file 経路 (= 別 stream)
- Codex 司令塔への自動 dispatch (= Phase 2 責務、本 Phase は queue write まで)
- 実 GitHub repo の作成 / `gh repo create` (= Phase 3 責務)
- G2 voice / W1 実装 (= 別 stream)
- bridge auth / token 関連

## Requirements

### Queue file location

**絶対パス**: `/home/hikaru/projects/hikaru-agent-knowledge/handoff/project-requests/`

新規 directory、本 Phase で初出。`.gitkeep` または README 1 file を実行役 PR の中で同梱して空 dir を git に保持 (= 既存 `from-execute/processed/` と同 pattern)。

filename pattern: `<created-iso-no-colon>-<request_id>.md`

例: `2026-05-12T0945-01HXY01NEWPROJ0ABC123.md`

### Inbound prefix

- **primary**: `/new-project` (= 既存 slash 慣習 `/queue` / `/consult-*` と整合)
- **alias**: `[新規]` (= 日本語 prefix、G2 voice / mobile 入力で打ちやすい)
- 大文字小文字区別なし (= `/NEW-PROJECT` も `[新規]` も `[ＮＥＷ]` も同等扱い、全角は `[新規]` 1 形のみ alias 許可、それ以外の全角は無視)
- prefix の **後ろに空白が無くてもよい** (= `/new-projectゲーム作りたい` も `[新規] ゲーム作りたい` も OK、既存 prefix と同 convention)
- 本文中の `/new-project` / `[新規]` (= 引用 / 言及) は **無視**、先頭のみ拾う

### Queue file frontmatter (= flat fields、既存軽量 parser 互換)

```yaml
---
type: project-request           # = 識別 key、done / review-request 等と区別
request_id: 01HXY01NEWPROJ0ABC  # = ULID、idempotency key
created_at: <ISO datetime>
source: g2 | mobile-slack | desktop-slack | unknown
                                # = Slack inbound の場合は mobile/desktop の区別がつかなければ desktop-slack default
requester: hikaru               # = single-Hikaru MVP、固定
status: drafting                # = drafting | brief_ok | repo_create_pending | repo_created | scaffolded | cancelled
                                # = Phase 1 では drafting で write、Phase 2 で brief_ok 等に遷移
slack_chat_id: <D...>
slack_message_id: <ts>
slack_thread_ts: <ts of root>
raw_prefix: /new-project | [新規]
                                # = どちらで起票されたか記録
project_name: null              # = Phase 2 で Codex が埋める、Phase 1 では null 固定
project_type: null              # = 同上
target_visibility: private      # = default private、Phase 2 で確認 / 変更可
out_of_scope_inherits: true     # = Phase 0 design の Out of scope ルールを継承
---

<本文 = Slack DM の本文 (= prefix 除いて転記)>
```

**Phase 1 では `project_name` 等 brief field は全て null / default** で write する。Codex の brief 起草 (= Phase 2) でこれらが埋まる。

### Watcher subroutine

1. Slack inbound DM message 受信
2. 本文先頭が `/new-project` または `[新規]` で始まるか check (= 大文字小文字区別なし、本文中の言及は無視)
3. matched → 以下を実行:
   1. `request_id` = ULID 払い出し
   2. queue file path = `/home/hikaru/projects/hikaru-agent-knowledge/handoff/project-requests/<created-iso>-<request_id>.md`
   3. frontmatter + 本文を write (= tmp file → rename で atomic、既存 `from-execute/processed/` と同 pattern)
   4. Slack 同 thread に ack reply:
      ```
      📋 project request 起票済
      id: <request_id>
      status: drafting
      次: Codex の brief 起草を待つ (= Phase 2)
      ```
   5. ack reply の `thread_ts` は元 message と一致させる (= 混線防止)
4. Slack post 失敗時:
   - queue file は残す (= write 済の state を維持)
   - bridge log に warn、次 poll では同 message を **重複処理しない** (= bridge の既存 message id idempotency に従う、本 Phase で新規 dedup は追加しない)
5. queue file write 失敗時 (= disk error):
   - Slack に「queue 起票 NG、bridge log 確認要」を 1 通通知
   - request 自体は **lost** 扱い (= retry なし、Hikaru の再投入を期待)
   - bridge log に error
6. **本 Phase は Codex / 実行役を dispatch しない** (= queue file write + ack reply で終了、後続は Phase 2)

### Idempotency

- 同 Slack `message_id` から **同 request_id を再生成しない** (= 既存 bridge の message id dedup に従う、ULID は新規払い出し)
- queue file 同名 (= 同 ULID 衝突) は実質発生しない (= ULID monotonic + timestamp)、衝突した場合は **error log + skip** (= overwrite しない)

### Naming guard (= Phase 0 design §3.3 の前倒し)

Phase 1 では `project_name` を Phase 2 まで埋めない方針なので、本 Phase で naming check はしない。ただし request 本文中に明らかな repo name 指定があっても **本 Phase で gh API には触らない** (= Phase 3 まで持ち越し)。

### Malformed handling

- inbound message の本文が **空** (= prefix のみ) → queue 起票せず、Slack に「本文を 1 行以上書いてください」と reply
- inbound message の **長さ過大** (= 8 KB 超) → 先頭 8 KB のみ queue に保存、Slack に「本文 truncate、続報は別 message で」と reply
- 本文に token-like 文字列 (= `Bearer ` / `xoxb-` / `xapp-` / `sk-` prefix) を検出 → **queue file には sanitize 後を write**、Slack ack に「token-like 検出、sanitize 済」を 1 行追記 (= Phase 1 codex-review queue / Phase 1 executor relay と同方針)

### 既存 prefix routing 非干渉

- 既存 `[abort]` / `[abort-test]` / `[abort cleanup]` / `status?` / `prs?` / `pending?` / `[codex-review]` / `OK` / `approve` / `cancel` の挙動を **本 Phase で変えない** (= regression test 必須)
- 既存 `from-execute/` の done / result / propose / progress / ask routing にも touch しない
- `/new-project` / `[新規]` は **新規 prefix**、既存の dialogue-* prefix (= `[tech]` / `[product]` 等) とは別経路、本 session の `CLAUDE.md` 振り分けには touch しない (= 本 Phase は bridge level)

## Tests

- **prefix match**: `/new-project` / `[新規]` / `/NEW-PROJECT` 全て match、本文中 `[新規]` 言及は no-op
- **queue file write**: valid prefix + 本文あり → file write + frontmatter parse 可、本文転記正、`project_name` / `project_type` null 固定
- **Slack ack reply**: queue id + status: drafting + 次 step 明示、thread_ts 一致
- **空本文 reject**: prefix のみ → queue write せず Slack reply
- **過大本文 truncate**: 10 KB 入力 → 8 KB truncate + Slack 通知
- **token sanitize**: 本文に `Bearer xoxb-...` → queue に sanitize 後、ack に検出 1 行
- **idempotent message_id**: 同 Slack message_id を 2 度処理 → queue 起票 1 回のみ
- **既存 prefix regression**: `[abort]` / `[abort-test]` / `status?` / `prs?` / `pending?` / `[codex-review]` / `OK` / `approve` / `cancel` の挙動本 Phase で変えない
- **既存 done routing regression**: `from-execute/done-*-*.md` 経路 unchanged
- **queue dir 不在時**: dir 自動作成 (= `mkdir -p`、既存 archive 慣習)、失敗時 Slack error

## Safety / Hard rules

- ❌ `git push origin main` 禁止 (= protection L1)
- ❌ `gh pr merge` 禁止 (= Hikaru gate)
- ❌ destructive command 禁止 (`rm -rf` / `git push --force` / `git reset --hard` / `git commit --amend`)
- ❌ subagent 再帰禁止 (= max depth 1)
- ❌ `.env` / token / API key を test fixture / commit / log raw に含めない
- ❌ queue file frontmatter / body の **token-like 文字列** を Slack ack に含めない (= sanitize 必須)
- ❌ 既存 done / result / propose / progress / ask 経路に touch しない
- ❌ 既存 ops prefix (`[abort]` / `status?` 等) 経路に touch しない
- ❌ approved dispatch (= `ccsc-81q`) outbox / bare OK gate に **触らない**
- ❌ 実 GitHub repo を作らない (= `gh repo create` 禁止、Phase 3 責務)
- ❌ Codex / 実行役を本 Phase で dispatch しない (= queue write + ack のみ、後続は Phase 2)
- ❌ merge 自動化なし
- ❌ 新 npm dependency 追加は Codex / Hikaru 事前確認必須
- ❌ G2 voice 関連の実装に踏み込まない (= 別 stream)
- ❌ `[abort]` flag ON 時は本 Phase の queue write も停止 (= 既存 flag 尊重、例外なし)
- ✅ queue file write は `handoff/project-requests/` 配下のみ
- ✅ acceptance criteria の test 全件 green を完了報告前に必ず確認
- ✅ feature branch + PR-only 提出

## Timeout / fallback

- **timeout: 90 min** (= 既存 watcher への subroutine 追加 + queue write + sanitize + tests + doc)
- 時間超過時 (= **WIP push 必須、stranded 禁止**):
  1. WIP branch を `git push -u origin <branch>` で push (= 必須)
  2. bd issue を `status: blocked` に update、blocked reason 追記
  3. **draft PR を出す** または最低でも push 済 commit SHA + blocked reason を `handoff/from-execute/<id>.md` (= `type: progress`、本 issue とは別 file、`status: blocked`) で報告
  4. 「未 push のまま終了」禁止
- 想定外 (= 既存 watcher 構造との互換性破壊 / 既存 ops prefix への影響発見) → 本 Phase 中断、Phase 0 design doc + 既存 codex-review queue / executor relay 実装を読み直して整合確認、Codex / Hikaru に escalate

## Out of scope

- ❌ Codex への brief 起草 dispatch (= Phase 2、別 PR / 別 bd issue)
- ❌ approved dispatch 経由の repo 作成 draft (= Phase 3)
- ❌ 実 `gh repo create` (= Phase 3)
- ❌ executor の initial PR 作成 (= Phase 4)
- ❌ template repo 整備 (= Phase 3+ 別 design)
- ❌ G2 HUD 通知 (= G2 W1 完成後の別 stream)
- ❌ G2 voice 実装
- ❌ Slack ack の文言以上の auto-action (= queue write + ack のみ)
- ❌ multi-user notification (= single-Hikaru MVP)
- ❌ merge 自動化
- ❌ secret / API key 管理機構
- ❌ executor completion relay の挙動変更 (= 別 stream、`ccsc-sbf` 不変)
- ❌ approved dispatch の挙動変更 (= 別 stream、`ccsc-81q` 不変)

## Branch / PR title

- branch: `feat/new-project-request-queue`
- PR title: `feat(watcher): add /new-project prefix → project-requests/ queue (Phase 1)`

## Acceptance criteria

- ✅ Slack 本文先頭が `/new-project` / `[新規]` (= 大文字小文字区別なし) で始まると、watcher が **queue file** を `hikaru-agent-knowledge/handoff/project-requests/<id>.md` に write
- ✅ queue file frontmatter は flat YAML、`type: project-request` / `request_id` (ULID) / `created_at` / `source` / `status: drafting` / `slack_chat_id` / `slack_message_id` / `slack_thread_ts` / `raw_prefix` / `project_name: null` / `project_type: null` / `target_visibility: private` を含む
- ✅ Slack 同 thread に ack reply 投稿、queue id + status: drafting + 次 step 明示
- ✅ 空本文 prefix のみ → queue 起票なし + Slack reply
- ✅ 本文 8 KB 超 → truncate + Slack 通知
- ✅ token-like 文字列 → queue に sanitize 後を write、ack に検出 1 行
- ✅ 同 Slack message_id 2 度処理 → queue 起票 1 回のみ
- ✅ queue dir 不在 → 自動作成
- ✅ queue file write 失敗 → Slack に error 通知、retry なし (= Hikaru 再投入期待)
- ✅ 既存 ops prefix (`[abort]` / `status?` / `prs?` / `pending?` / `[codex-review]` / `OK` / `approve` / `cancel`) regression なし
- ✅ 既存 `from-execute/` done routing regression なし
- ✅ `[abort]` flag ON で本 prefix も停止
- ✅ test 全件 green、CI 確認
- ✅ `docs/inbound-auto-processing.md` に `/new-project` / `[新規]` 動作追記
- ✅ Codex / 実行役の自動 dispatch なし (= Phase 1 は queue write + ack で完結)
- ✅ 実 GitHub repo 作成なし、approved dispatch outbox 不変

## depends_on

- ✅ Phase 0 design (`hikaru-agent-knowledge` PR #23 が main 入り) — **soft dep**、design ref として Phase 0 doc が利用可能
- 既存 watcher (`scripts/inbound-watcher.ts`) が working (= regression baseline)
- 既存 `handoff/from-execute/` archive convention (= 物理 dir 慣習、`mkdir -p` で複製可)
- 既存 ops prefix routing (= `[abort]` / `status?` / `[codex-review]` 等) が green

## References

- `hikaru-agent-knowledge` PR #23 (= Phase 0 design、`docs/issue-drafts/new-project-bootstrap-from-g2.md`)
- `hikaru-agent-knowledge/docs/issue-drafts/codex-review-queue-phase1.md` (= 軽量 parser / idempotency / token reject の pattern 元、本 Phase が踏襲)
- `hikaru-agent-knowledge/docs/issue-drafts/codex-review-queue-phase2-status.md` (= queue 軽量 parser policy 元)
- `hikaru-agent-knowledge/docs/issue-drafts/executor-completion-relay.md` (= 同類の filesystem channel 設計、`c66ddba`)
- `hikaru-agent-knowledge/docs/issue-drafts/executor-completion-relay-runtime-runbook.md` (= 同 watcher への subroutine 追加 pattern、`046dc97`)
- `hikaru-agent-knowledge/docs/codex-claude-ops.md` (= 役割境界、SoT)
- `hikaru-agent-knowledge/CLAUDE.md` (= branch protection、destructive 禁止、prefix routing)
- `claude-code-slack-channel/docs/environment-separation.md` (= passive mode invariant)
- `claude-code-slack-channel/docs/inbound-auto-processing.md` (= 既存 ops prefix routing doc、本 Phase で追記対象)
- 既存 watcher: `claude-code-slack-channel/scripts/inbound-watcher.ts`
notes:
PR #8 opened: https://github.com/4466hikaru/claude-code-slack-channel/pull/8

title: feat(watcher): add executor completion relay (done file → Slack notify)
description:
## Goal

Phase 0 design (= `hikaru-agent-knowledge/docs/issue-drafts/executor-completion-relay.md`、`c66ddba` で main 入り) を踏まえ、bridge / watcher に **実行役の完了通知 relay** を実装する。

実行役 (passive execution、Slack edge 非所持) が `/home/hikaru/projects/hikaru-agent-knowledge/handoff/from-execute/done-*.md` に done file を write、watcher が検知して Slack DM に「実行役完了」通知 + processed/ archive。

新 mechanism は作らない、既存 watcher poll loop + 既存 archive convention を再利用する delta 実装。

## Files to touch

| file | 操作 | 内容 |
|---|---|---|
| `scripts/inbound-watcher.ts` | 修正 | `handoff/from-execute/done-*-*.md` polling subroutine 追加、既存 routing には touch しない |
| `scripts/inbound-watcher.test.ts` | 修正 / 追加 | 下記 Tests を追加 |
| `docs/inbound-auto-processing.md` | 修正 | done file 動作追記、既存 result / propose / progress / ask routing と区別を明記 |
| `docs/approved-dispatch.md` (任意、cross-link 用) | 修正 | 既存 doc がある場合のみ References を update、無ければ作らない |

**触らない** (scope 外):
- 既存 `from-execute/` の `result` / `propose` / `progress` / `ask` type routing (= 相談役 coordinator polling 処理、本 Phase は touch しない)
- approved dispatch / `from-codex/` outbox (= 別 stream)
- `[codex-review]` queue (= 既存 Phase 1、本 Phase は補完経路として参照のみ、実装変更なし)
- bridge auth / token 関連
- G2 経路 (= Phase 3 想定、本 Phase out of scope)

## Requirements

### Done file location

**絶対パス**: `/home/hikaru/projects/hikaru-agent-knowledge/handoff/from-execute/`

filename pattern: `done-<created-iso-no-colon>-<done_id>.md` (= 例 `done-2026-05-11T1430-01HXY01ABC23DEF45GH.md`)

### Frontmatter (= flat fields、既存軽量 parser 互換)

```yaml
---
type: done                       # = 識別 key、result / propose / progress / ask と区別
done_id: 01HXY01ABC23DEF45GH     # = ULID、idempotency key
created_at: <ISO datetime>
executor_session: <session id or empty>
related_bd: <bd issue id or empty>
related_pr: <PR URL or empty>
status: complete                 # = complete | blocked | failed
summary: <one-line description>
needs_review: true               # = "review 待ち" 文言含めるか
---
<本文 = optional context、Slack notify には truncate>
```

### Watcher subroutine

1. `handoff/from-execute/` を `*.md` で scan、filename pattern `done-*-*.md` のみ対象 (= 既存 result / propose / progress / ask とは別 stream)
2. 各 file の frontmatter parse (= 既存軽量 parser、`type:` / `done_id:` / `status:` 等を抽出)
3. `done_id` を **5 分 sliding window** で重複検知 (= Phase 1 codex-review queue pattern 踏襲)
4. 新規 + `type: done` なら Slack DM `D0B2GN71MNE` に format:
   ```
   ✅ 実行役完了: <summary>
     bd:     <related_bd>
     PR:     <related_pr>
     status: <status>
     done_id: <done_id>
     [review 待ち]   (= needs_review: true 時のみ)
   ```
5. Slack post 成功時、file を **`/home/hikaru/projects/hikaru-agent-knowledge/handoff/from-execute/processed/`** へ atomic move (= 絶対パス、既存 archive convention 準拠)
6. 失敗時は file を残置、bridge log に warn、次 poll で再 attempt (= idempotency で重複 Slack post なし)

### Malformed handling

- 必須 field 欠落 (= `done_id` / `type` / `status` / `summary` のいずれか不在) → **Slack notify せず**、bridge log に format error、file 残置 (= 実行役 bug 確認用)
- `type` が `done` 以外 → 本 subroutine 対象外、既存 routing に委ねる (= touch しない)
- duplicate `done_id` (= 5 分 window 内) → no-op + warn log、Slack post しない、file 残置 → next poll で同じ判定

### 既存 prefix routing 非干渉

- 既存 `[abort]` / `[abort-test]` / `[abort cleanup]` / `status?` / `prs?` / `[codex-review]` / `OK` / `approve` / `cancel` / `pending?` routing は **本 Phase で変えない** (= regression test 必須)
- 既存 `from-execute/` の `result` / `propose` / `progress` / `ask` type 処理にも touch しない

## Tests

- **Parser flat parse**: 正常 / `type:` field 欠落 / unknown `type` 値 / 必須 field 欠落 → malformed handling、watcher crash しない
- **done file 検知**: `type: done` + valid frontmatter → Slack notify + processed/ archive
- **non-done type**: `type: result` / `type: propose` 等は本 subroutine 対象外、既存 routing に委ねる (= 二重処理しない)
- **Idempotent done_id**: 同 `done_id` の 2 度処理 → 1 度のみ Slack post + archive、2 度目 no-op + warn
- **Malformed reject**: 必須 field 欠落 → Slack post せず log、file 残置
- **Slack API error**: dispatch 失敗時 file を archive しない、次 poll で再 attempt、idempotency で冗長 post なし
- **needs_review 反映**: `needs_review: true` のみ "review 待ち" 文言含む、`false` は含まない
- **既存 prefix routing regression**: `[abort]` / `[abort-test]` / `status?` / `prs?` / `[codex-review]` / `OK` / `approve` / `cancel` / `pending?` の挙動本 Phase で変えない

## Safety / Hard rules

- ❌ `git push origin main` 禁止 (= protection L1)
- ❌ `gh pr merge` 禁止 (= Hikaru gate)
- ❌ destructive command 禁止 (`rm -rf` / `git push --force` / `git reset --hard` / `git commit --amend`)
- ❌ subagent 再帰禁止 (max depth 1)
- ❌ `.env` / token / API key を test fixture / commit / log raw に含めない
- ❌ done file frontmatter / body の **token-like 文字列** (= `Bearer ` / `xoxb-` / `xapp-` / `sk-` prefix) を Slack post に含めない (= bridge 側 sanitize、Phase 1 codex-review queue §4.8 同方針)
- ❌ 既存 `result` / `propose` / `progress` / `ask` 経路に touch しない
- ❌ arbitrary command dispatch なし (= done file は notify 用、code execution / shell trigger なし)
- ❌ merge 自動化なし (= 完了通知が出ても Hikaru gate で merge、自動 merge しない)
- ❌ 新 npm dependency 追加は Codex / Hikaru 事前確認必須
- ✅ done file write は `handoff/from-execute/` 配下のみ (= 実行役側責務、watcher 側は read + archive のみ)
- ✅ acceptance criteria の test 全件 green を完了報告前に必ず確認
- ✅ feature branch + PR-only 提出

## Timeout / fallback

- **timeout: 90 min** (= 既存 watcher への subroutine 追加 + parser + idempotency + tests)
- 時間超過時 (= **WIP push 必須、stranded 禁止**):
  1. WIP branch を `git push -u origin <branch>` で push (= 必須)
  2. bd issue を `status: blocked` に update、blocked reason 追記
  3. **draft PR を出す** または最低でも push 済 commit SHA + blocked reason を `handoff/from-execute/<id>.md` (= `type: progress`、本 issue とは別 file、`status: blocked`) で報告
  4. 「未 push のまま終了」禁止
- 想定外 (= 既存 watcher 構造との互換性破壊 / 既存 result routing への影響発見) → 本 Phase 中断、Phase 0 design doc を読み直して整合確認、Codex / Hikaru に escalate

## Out of scope

- ❌ approved dispatch core 実装 (= 既存 `ccsc-81q`)
- ❌ G2 W2 / W3 / Stage B (= 別 design)
- ❌ Phase 2 (= 実行役 side の helper / codex-review queue 補完経路 auto-write、別 PR / 別 bd issue)
- ❌ Phase 3 (= archive auto cleanup / G2 notification、別 PR)
- ❌ multi-user notification (= single-Hikaru MVP)
- ❌ merge 自動化
- ❌ Real-time push (= polling 経路、push に進めない)
- ❌ token rotation 本格実装

- ✅ malformed file は notify せず log + file 残置
- ✅ duplicate `done_id` は idempotent (= 1 度のみ post)
- ✅ Slack API error 時は archive せず次 poll で再 attempt

- ✅ 既存 prefix routing (`[abort]` / `status?` / `prs?` / `[codex-review]` / `OK` / `approve` / `cancel` / `pending?` 等) regression なし

title: fix(watcher): process approved-dispatch thread replies
description:
Slack thread replies are currently ignored by the inbound watcher because conversations.history only returns top-level DM messages. As of PR #5 (approved-dispatch Phase 1) runtime test, replying `approve runtime-test-003` inside the thread that the watcher posted to never reaches handleApprove — the action only worked when sent at the DM root.

Make the watcher also poll active thread replies for the four dispatch verbs (`OK` / `approve <id>` / `cancel <id>` / `pending?`). [abort] / [abort-test] / [abort cleanup] / [codex-review] stay main-DM-only. Sender gate unchanged. Bridge core diff-zero.

title: feat(dispatch): add approved Codex outbox dispatch
description:
## Goal

Phase 0 design (= `hikaru-agent-knowledge/docs/issue-drafts/approved-dispatch-delta-design.md`、merge commit `2272024`) を踏まえ、bridge / watcher に **Codex → Claude outbox dispatch** の実装を追加する。

具体的には:

- `/home/hikaru/projects/hikaru-agent-knowledge/handoff/from-codex/` の pending draft を監視
- 軽量 frontmatter parser で flat fields (`status` / `draft_id` / `slack_chat_id` / `slack_thread_ts` / `ttl` / `target_role` 等) を抽出
- 新 Slack prefix routing 4 件 (`OK` / `approve <draft-id>` / `cancel <draft-id>` / `pending?`) を追加
- bare `OK` の誤承認防止 (= 3 条件全部満たす時のみ approve、複数 pending 時は拒否 + 候補一覧返却)
- abort flag 検知時は dispatch 停止
- status transition: `pending` → `approved` → `sent` / `failed` / `cancelled`

queue 登録 + dispatch のみ。Codex 自動 review / merge / write は本 Phase 範囲外、approved dispatch は **Hikaru gate を必ず経由**。

## Files to touch

| file | 操作 | 内容 |
|---|---|---|
| `scripts/inbound-watcher.ts` | 修正 | 4 new Slack prefix (`OK` / `approve` / `cancel` / `pending?`) routing 追加、既存 prefix routing には touch しない |
| `scripts/dispatch-outbox.ts` (新規想定) | 新規 | `handoff/from-codex/` poll loop + flat frontmatter parser + status transition + dispatch (= Slack DM 配信) |
| `scripts/inbound-watcher.test.ts` | 修正 / 追加 | 下記 Tests を追加 |
| `scripts/dispatch-outbox.test.ts` (新規想定) | 新規 | parser / transition / dispatch logic の test |
| `docs/inbound-auto-processing.md` | 修正 | 4 new prefix 動作追記、既存 status? routing と直交確認 |
| `docs/approved-dispatch.md` (新規想定) | 新規 | outbox 動作 doc (= `handoff/from-codex/` 配置、frontmatter spec、TTL、status flow) |
| `CLAUDE.md` (任意) | 修正 | hikaru-agent-knowledge の Phase 0 SoT への cross-link |

**触らない** (= scope 外):
- 既存 prefix routing (`[abort]` / `[abort-test]` / `[abort cleanup]` / `status?` / `prs?` / `[codex-review]`) のロジック / test
- `handoff/codex-review-queue/` (= Phase 1/2 codex-review queue の責務、別 dir)
- bridge auth / token 関連の実装
- approved dispatch の G2 経路 (= 別 design)
- `status?` reply の outbox count (= Phase 2 で別 PR、本 Phase scope 外)

## Requirements

### Outbox dir

**絶対パス**: `/home/hikaru/projects/hikaru-agent-knowledge/handoff/from-codex/`

(= Phase 0 design §2.1 と整合、cwd 依存回避、既存 `from-execute/` `from-consult/` と並列)

### Frontmatter (= flat fields のみ、既存 codex-review queue parser 互換)

```yaml
---
created_at: <ISO>
source: codex
target_role: consultant            # = consultant | executor
target_channel: slack_dm           # = slack_dm | handoff
priority: normal                   # = normal | urgent
draft_id: 01HXY...                 # = ULID、二重送信防止 key
status: pending                    # = pending | approved | sent | failed | cancelled
approval_required: true
approved_at: null
approved_by: null
slack_chat_id: D...                # = placeholder、実 ID は bridge config
slack_thread_ts: null
ttl: 30m                           # = pending TTL、超過で auto cancel
---
<本文>
```

軽量 parser は `status:` / `draft_id:` / `slack_thread_ts:` / `ttl:` 等の各 line を `^<key>:\s*(\S+)\s*$` 等の正規表現で抽出 (= Phase 2 codex-review queue §4.8 の方針踏襲、新 YAML / frontmatter parser dependency 追加禁止)。

### 4 New Slack prefix routing (= 既存 `CLAUDE.md` L85〜 routing 表に追加、既存 prefix と完全直交)

| prefix | 動作 | 返信 |
|---|---|---|
| `OK` | **3 条件全部 ** 満たす時のみ approve: (1) pending exactly 1 件、(2) その 1 件が TTL 内、(3) その 1 件の `slack_thread_ts` が直近 OK 受信 thread の `thread_ts` と一致。**満たさない場合は拒否 + max 5 件候補一覧返却** (= oldest auto-approval 禁止) | 「approved `<draft-id>`、dispatch 中」or 「ambiguous: 候補一覧、`approve <draft-id>` で明示」 |
| `approve <draft-id>` | 明示 approve、ambiguity なし、always 受理 (= TTL 超過は `cancelled` 扱い) | 「approved `<draft-id>`、dispatch 中」 |
| `cancel <draft-id>` | dispatch 前なら `cancelled` flip、`approved → cancelled` は 5 秒 grace 期間内のみ可 (= `sent` 後は不可) | 「cancelled `<draft-id>`」or 「too late: already sent」 |
| `pending?` | 現在 pending な draft 一覧 (= max 5 件、created_at 昇順) | `<draft-id>: <summary 1 行>` × N (= summary は本文先頭 1 行 or empty) |

### Status transition

```
pending ─→ approved (= D2 OK / approve 受信、5 秒 grace period 開始)
approved ─→ sent (= 5 秒経過 + dispatch 成功)
approved ─→ failed (= 5 秒経過 + dispatch error)
approved ─→ cancelled (= 5 秒以内 cancel 受信)
pending ─→ cancelled (= TTL 超過 / cancel 受信 / abort flag)
```

各 transition で frontmatter `status` field を **flat update** (= file rewrite、parser 互換維持)。`approved_at` / `approved_by` も同時 set。

### Idempotency (= D4 ULID `draft_id`)

- 同 `draft_id` の **再 write は禁止** (= bridge / watcher 側で reject、Codex 側のバグ検知)
- `OK` / `approve` / `cancel` は **冪等** (= 同 draft_id を 2 度承認しても sent 1 回、`already <status>` warn reply)
- `sent` 遷移後の操作は no-op + Slack reply に「already sent」

### Abort flag 検知 (= D5 既存 flag 継承)

- `/home/hikaru/projects/hikaru-agent-knowledge/handoff/abort-lv2` 存在時 = **dispatch 全停止** (= `approved` 状態の draft は `sent` に進めず保留、`pending` は受付続行 / approve 遷移は通常通り)
- abort 解除後 (`[abort cleanup]`) は保留中の `approved` を順次 dispatch、TTL 超過なら `cancelled` 自動遷移

### 既存 prefix 非干渉

- `[abort]` / `[abort-test]` / `[abort cleanup]` / `status?` / `prs?` / `[codex-review]` の routing は **本 Phase で変えない** (= regression test 必須)
- `handoff/codex-review-queue/` (= Phase 1/2 codex-review queue) には touch しない

## Tests

- **Frontmatter flat parse**: 正常 / `status` field 欠落 / 値が unknown → malformed handling、watcher crash しない (= 既存 Phase 2 軽量 parser policy 踏襲)
- **Bare `OK` ambiguity rejection**: pending 0 件 / 2 件以上 / TTL 超過 / thread 不一致 → 拒否 + 候補一覧返却、approve しない (= oldest auto 禁止)
- **Bare `OK` 受理**: pending exactly 1 件 + TTL 内 + thread 一致 → approve 成功
- **Explicit `approve <draft-id>`**: 候補が複数あっても明示 ID で正しく approve、ambiguity なし
- **Cancel**: `pending → cancelled`、`approved (5 秒以内) → cancelled`、`sent 後 cancel` → too late reply
- **Abort flag blocks dispatch**: abort flag 存在時、`approved` から `sent` 遷移しないこと (= 保留)、`abort cleanup` 後に保留分が dispatch される
- **Idempotent approve**: 同 draft_id を 2 度 approve → 1 度のみ dispatch、2 度目は no-op + warn
- **Idempotent draft_id**: 同 draft_id の file 再 write 検知時 reject、bridge log に warn
- **Status transition log**: 各 transition で audit log に `draft_id` / `from_status` / `to_status` / `actor` (= token raw 出さず)
- **既存 prefix regression**: `[abort]` / `[abort-test]` / `status?` / `prs?` / `[codex-review]` の挙動が変わらないこと (= test green)

## Safety / Hard rules

- ❌ `git push origin main` 禁止 (= protection L1)
- ❌ `gh pr merge` 禁止 (= Hikaru gate)
- ❌ destructive command 禁止 (`rm -rf` / `git push --force` / `git reset --hard` / `git commit --amend` 等)
- ❌ subagent 再帰禁止 (= max recursion depth 1)
- ❌ `.env` / token / secret を test fixture / commit / log raw に含めない
- ❌ queue file write は **`/home/hikaru/projects/hikaru-agent-knowledge/handoff/from-codex/` 配下のみ** (= 他 dir には write しない、特に `handoff/codex-review-queue/` は read-only 不可侵)
- ❌ merge 自動化禁止 (= `gh pr merge` 系の auto-trigger なし)
- ❌ approved dispatch は **Hikaru gate 必須** (= 自動承認しない、bare `OK` ですら 3 条件全部 + 候補一覧返却が gate)
- ❌ Codex 自動 review / merge / write を実装しない (= Phase 1 範囲外、Phase 3 で別途検討)
- ❌ 新 npm dependency 追加は Codex / Hikaru 事前確認必須 (= Phase 2 §4.8 同方針)
- ❌ `[abort-test]` 経路 / `handoff/abort-lv2` 既存 flag に touch しない (= 継承のみ)
- ✅ acceptance criteria の test 全件 green を完了報告前に必ず確認
- ✅ 全作業を feature branch、PR-only 提出

## Timeout / fallback

- **timeout: 120 min** (= 既存 watcher への 4 prefix 追加 + parser + status transition + 多 prefix test、Phase 1 codex-review queue と同等 scope)
- 時間超過時 (= **WIP push 必須、stranded 禁止**):
  1. WIP branch を `git push -u origin <branch>` で push (= 必須)
  2. 本 bd issue を `status: blocked` に update、blocked reason を本文追記
  3. **draft PR を出す** または最低でも push 済 commit SHA + blocked reason を `handoff/from-execute/<id>.md` (`type: progress, status: blocked`) で報告
  4. 「未 push のまま終了」禁止
- 想定外 (=既存 watcher の prefix routing 構造が parse-able でない / 既存 SSE / 既存 ops 経路に副作用) → 本 Phase 中断、Phase 0 design doc を読み直して整合確認、Codex / Hikaru に escalate

## Out of scope

- ❌ G2 UI (= `docs/g2-codex-control-mvp.md` §3、別 phase で本 dispatch 経路を G2 から呼び出す側)
- ❌ Codex automation 本体 (= Codex 側責務、bridge は受け口)
- ❌ multi-user approval (= single-Hikaru MVP)
- ❌ `status?` reply に outbox count 追加 (= Phase 2 別 PR)
- ❌ merge 自動化 / auto-merge (= Hikaru gate 維持)
- ❌ failure / replay / TTL 自動運用 (= Phase 3、本 Phase は基本実装のみ)
- ❌ archive 自動 move (= sent → processed/、Phase 3)

## Branch / PR title

- branch: `feat/approved-dispatch-outbox`
- PR title: `feat(dispatch): add approved Codex outbox dispatch`

## Acceptance criteria

- ✅ `handoff/from-codex/` の pending draft が watcher で検出される
- ✅ flat frontmatter parser が `status` / `draft_id` / `slack_thread_ts` / `ttl` / `target_role` 等を正しく抽出
- ✅ 4 new prefix (`OK` / `approve <draft-id>` / `cancel <draft-id>` / `pending?`) が routing 表に追加され、各 prefix が仕様通り動作
- ✅ bare `OK` は 3 条件全部 (= exactly 1 pending + TTL 内 + thread 一致) 満たす時のみ approve、満たさない場合は候補一覧返却 + `approve <draft-id>` 要求
- ✅ explicit `approve <draft-id>` は always 受理、ambiguity なし
- ✅ status transition (`pending → approved → sent / failed / cancelled`) が仕様通り
- ✅ abort flag (`handoff/abort-lv2`) 存在時、`approved → sent` が保留される
- ✅ `draft_id` (ULID) idempotency 機能、再 write reject、approve / cancel 冪等
- ✅ 既存 prefix routing (`[abort]` / `[abort-test]` / `status?` / `prs?` / `[codex-review]`) に regression なし
- ✅ test 全件 green、CI 確認
- ✅ `docs/inbound-auto-processing.md` / `docs/approved-dispatch.md` (新規) に動作 doc

## depends_on

- ✅ Phase 0 design (`2272024`) merged
- 既存 watcher の `[abort-test]` / `status?` / `[codex-review]` routing が green (= regression baseline)
- 既存 `handoff/abort-lv2` flag 経路が機能 (= D5 継承の前提)
- (任意) Phase 1 codex-review queue (`ccsc-9hm`) merged (= soft、別 dir なので strict には不要だが、watcher の prefix routing 構造に整合させる baseline として参照)

## References

- `hikaru-agent-knowledge` PR #18 (= Phase 0 design source、merge commit `2272024`)
- `hikaru-agent-knowledge/docs/issue-drafts/approved-dispatch-delta-design.md` (= Phase 0 delta design 正本)
- `hikaru-agent-knowledge/docs/issue-drafts/codex-review-queue-phase1.md` (= idempotent / token reject pattern 元、本 Phase が D4 で踏襲)
- `hikaru-agent-knowledge/docs/issue-drafts/codex-review-queue-phase2-status.md` (= 軽量 parser policy 元、本 Phase が踏襲)
- `hikaru-agent-knowledge/docs/codex-claude-ops.md` (= 役割境界、approved dispatch §9 の next phase ハコを Phase 0+1 で実装)
- `hikaru-agent-knowledge/CLAUDE.md` / `AGENTS.md` L85〜 (= 既存 Slack ops prefix routing、本 Phase が `OK` / `approve` / `cancel` / `pending?` を追加)
- `hikaru-agent-knowledge/docs/hikaru-out-mvp-checklist.md` §4 abort 経路 (= D5 で継承)
- 既存 watcher: `claude-code-slack-channel/scripts/inbound-watcher.ts`
- 既存 inbound doc: `claude-code-slack-channel/docs/inbound-auto-processing.md`

title: feat(watcher): add [codex-review] prefix routing + queue file write
description:
## Goal

Phase 0 design `hikaru-agent-knowledge/docs/issue-drafts/codex-review-queue.md` (= main 入り、merge commit `fb60576`) を踏まえ、`scripts/inbound-watcher.ts` に `[codex-review]` prefix routing を追加し、Slack 完了報告を queue file として **絶対パス** `/home/hikaru/projects/hikaru-agent-knowledge/handoff/codex-review-queue/` に保存する。

queue 登録のみ。Codex 自動 review / merge / write は本 Phase 範囲外 (= Phase 3)。approved dispatch ではない、merge は人間 gate。

**位置付け** (= 急務ではない): Codex automation が 5 分おきに 3 repo (hikaru-agent-knowledge / claude-code-slack-channel / birth-kaitori) の open PR を確認するため、Phase 1 不在でも open PR は拾える。Phase 1 は **PR 以外の Issue / summary / priority** を queue 経由で拾うための精度向上。

## Files to touch

- `scripts/inbound-watcher.ts` (= 修正、`[codex-review]` parse + queue write + format error 返信)
- `scripts/inbound-watcher.test.ts` (= 修正 / 追加、下記 Tests)
- `docs/inbound-auto-processing.md` (= 修正、`[codex-review]` 動作追記、絶対パス + placeholder 方針)
- `CLAUDE.md` (任意、Phase 0 SoT への cross-link)

**触らない**: 既存 prefix routing、Slack auth / token 関連、bridge outbound delivery、approved dispatch。

## Requirements

### Prefix forms

```
[codex-review] pr=<github-pr-url> summary=<text>
[codex-review] issue=<github-issue-url> summary=<text>
[codex-review] repo=<owner/repo> pr=<number> summary=<text>
```

- prefix 直後にスペース 1、3 form は排他 (= `pr=` と `issue=` 同時は invalid)
- `summary=` から行末まで 1 行 free text
- 大文字小文字 case-insensitive、本文先頭のみ認識 (= 引用 / 文中言及は無視)

### Queue file

- **絶対パス** `/home/hikaru/projects/hikaru-agent-knowledge/handoff/codex-review-queue/<created-iso-no-colon>-<id>.md`
- filename は Windows illegal char (`:` `*` `?` `<` `>` `|` `"`) 不使用
- 中身は YAML frontmatter (必須 8 field: `created_at` / `source` / `repo` / `pr_number` or `issue_url` / `sender_role` / `summary` / `status` / `priority`) + optional markdown body
- runtime queue は実 Slack metadata (`sender_id` = user_id / `chat_id` / `message_ts`) 保存 OK (= token ではない、idempotent + audit に必要)
- token / `.env` / API key は doc / runtime 両層禁止

### Malformed input

- 必須 field 欠落 / 排他違反 / unknown 引数 → queue 入れず、Slack thread に「format error: 期待 `[codex-review] pr=<url> summary=<text>`」と 1 行返信

### Idempotent update

- 同一 `repo` + `pr_number` (or `issue_url`) 重複 → 既存 file update、新規 file 作らない
- update 可能な sender: original sender + Hikaru の Slack user_id のみ、それ以外は format error

### Queue size cap

- > 20 件: warning (Slack 返信に追記)
- > 50 件: reject (新規登録不可)
- size カウントは `pending` + `blocked` のみ (= `reviewed` 除外)

### Token detect (= reject-only、Phase 1 確定方針)

- `xoxb-` / `xapp-` / `Bearer ` / `sk-` 等 prefix patterns + length check で検出
- 検出時 → queue 入れず Slack に format error 返信
- masking は **Phase 2 以降で再検討**、本 Phase は reject-only で固定 (= 揺れない)

### 既存 prefix 非干渉

- `[abort]` / `[abort-test]` / `[abort cleanup]` / `status?` / `prs?` の routing 不変、regression test 必須

## Tests

- Parser 正常系 (3 form / 空白・unicode / 大文字小文字)
- Malformed input (排他違反 / URL invalid / 必須 field 欠落 / 本文先頭以外 / prefix 直後 invalid)
- Duplicate idempotent update (sender 制約含む)
- Queue size cap (warning 20 / reject 50 / `reviewed` 除外)
- Token detect (`Bearer` / `xoxb-` / `sk-` で reject + format error、masking しない)
- 既存 prefix regression (`[abort]` / `[abort-test]` / `status?` / `prs?` の挙動不変)

## Safety / Hard rules

- ❌ `git push origin main` 禁止 (= protection L1)
- ❌ `gh pr merge` 禁止 (= Hikaru gate)
- ❌ destructive command 禁止 (`rm -rf` / `git push --force` / `git reset --hard` / `git commit --amend`)
- ❌ subagent 再帰禁止 (max depth 1)
- ❌ `.env` / token / secret を test fixture / commit に含めない
- ✅ acceptance test 全件 green を完了報告前に確認
- ✅ feature branch、PR-only 提出

## Timeout / fallback

- **timeout: 120 min**
- 時間超過時 (= **WIP push 必須、stranded 禁止**):
  1. WIP branch を `git push -u origin <branch>` で push (= 必須)
  2. 本 bd issue を `status: blocked` に update、blocked reason 追記
  3. **draft PR を出す** または最低でも push 済 commit SHA + blocked reason を `handoff/from-execute/<id>.md` (`type: progress, status: blocked`) で報告
  4. 「未 push のまま終了」禁止
- token detect false positive で reject 多発 → reject-only 方針固定 (= 揺れない、masking は Phase 2 以降)

## Out of scope

- Codex automation 実装 (= Codex 側責務)
- merge automation (= Hikaru gate を維持)
- approved dispatch (= 別 design)
- G2 W2 / W3 (= 別 design)
- `status?` への pending count 追加 (= Phase 2)
- `reviewed` → archive atomic move (= Phase 3)
- token masking (= Phase 2 以降)

## Branch / PR title

- branch: `feat/codex-review-queue-watcher`
- PR title: `feat(watcher): add [codex-review] prefix routing + queue file write`

## Acceptance criteria

- ✅ Slack DM の `[codex-review] ...` (3 form) が `/home/hikaru/projects/hikaru-agent-knowledge/handoff/codex-review-queue/<iso>-<id>.md` を作る
- ✅ Slack thread に「Codex review queue に登録済み (queue size: N)」と 1 行返信
- ✅ malformed input は queue 入らず Slack に format error 返信
- ✅ 同一 PR 重複は idempotent update (file 増えず status / summary 上書き)
- ✅ queue size cap (warning 20 / reject 50) 機能
- ✅ token-like raw secret は **reject + format error** (= reject-only、queue file 作られない)
- ✅ 既存 prefix routing に regression なし
- ✅ `status?` の挙動を変えない (= pending count 追加は Phase 2)
- ✅ `docs/inbound-auto-processing.md` に `[codex-review]` 動作追記
- ✅ test 全件 green、CI 確認

## References

- `hikaru-agent-knowledge` PR #14 (= 本 bd issue の source、merge commit `be8adf3`)
- `hikaru-agent-knowledge/docs/issue-drafts/codex-review-queue-phase1.md` (= 詳細 design 正本)
- `hikaru-agent-knowledge/docs/issue-drafts/codex-review-queue.md` (= Phase 0 SoT、`fb60576`)
- `hikaru-agent-knowledge/docs/codex-claude-ops.md` (= 役割境界、SoT)
- 既存 watcher: `claude-code-slack-channel/scripts/inbound-watcher.ts`
- 既存 inbound doc: `claude-code-slack-channel/docs/inbound-auto-processing.md`

Codex review v2 reflected (commit 392b996): per-trigger sender gate + frontmatter unescape fix. 78 pass / 193 expects.

title: Design pairing.accepted journaling: file-watcher vs IPC vs server-side pairing
description: Split off from ccsc-rc1. pairing.accepted is emitted when a user runs /slack-channel:access pair <code> — but the skill runs in Claude Code's process, not the MCP server. Server only sees access.json mutations on next getAccess() load, which is too late and lossy (multiple acceptances could collapse into one load). Three design options, each with tradeoffs: (1) File-watcher: server.ts uses fs.watch/chokidar on access.json, diffs prev vs. new state, journals pending→allowFrom transitions as pairing.accepted. Pro: no skill changes. Con: racy (missed events during server downtime), diff-based inference not authoritative. (2) Skill writes pending-journal.jsonl: /slack-channel:access pair appends an event record to a pending-journal file; server.ts drains and flushes to audit.log on load. Pro: no missed events. Con: new IPC surface, new hash-chain seam. (3) Move pairing acceptance into server.ts: skill becomes a thin CLI shim that sends a signal (SIGUSR1 with code in /tmp, or named pipe, or local HTTP endpoint) to the running server which performs the mutation and journals inline. Pro: authoritative, single writer. Con: biggest refactor, adds new IPC attack surface, changes skill semantics. Acceptance: pick an option, document tradeoffs in 000-docs/audit-journal-architecture.md §pairing-events, implement with tests covering the race/crash cases. Until this ships, audit log has pairing.issued but not pairing.accepted — pairing lifecycle is reconstructible (issued → absent from pending + present in allowFrom = accepted) but not auditable from the journal alone.
notes: PR #150 opened — https://github.com/jeremylongshore/claude-code-slack-channel/pull/150. Design doc added to 000-docs/audit-journal-architecture.md §pairing-events. All 9 local gates green: 704/704 tests, coverage 98.47%/98.82%, crap max 28. Awaiting CI + Gemini review.
close_reason: Shipped in PR #150 (merge commit 711a242) on 2026-04-22. lib.ts detectNewAllowFrom(prev, current) is the pure diff primitive; server.ts getAccess() holds module-level prevAllowFrom snapshot and emits one pairing.accepted per new user with { user: userId } payload. First call after boot seeds the baseline silently; subsequent calls detect deltas. Design rationale documented in 000-docs/audit-journal-architecture.md §pairing-events covering the three rejected alternatives (fs.watch, drain-file, server-side relocation) and the chosen lazy-diff properties: platform-agnostic, tamper-resistant by construction, silent on removal, no event spam at boot. Ten new unit tests in server.test.ts. One Gemini 🟢 round applied (collapsed manual dedup loop to Set-then-filter). All 9 CI gates + 5 PR checks green. Test count 694 → 704, coverage 98.47% line / 98.82% func. Audit EventKind coverage now 19/19 of v0.5.0-declared kinds.

title: Server-side duplicate-id rejection for policy rules
description: ACCESS.md §"Safety checks the loader runs" promises: "Duplicate-id rejection — two rules sharing an id fail load." Server.ts loadPolicy() (around line 400-440) calls parsePolicyRules() → detectShadowing() → detectBroadAutoApprove() but DOES NOT implement the duplicate-id check. The Zod schema also does not enforce it (see policy.ts RuleBase — id is just z.string().min(1).max(120), no uniqueness). This means two rules sharing an id load cleanly today; the evaluator walks in authored order and the later rule is effectively shadowed. Discovered 2026-04-21 while building /slack-channel:policy skill (ccsc-0ss). Workaround: scripts/policy-validate.ts (shipped with the skill) implements the duplicate-id check so the skill surfaces the error BEFORE write. Proper fix: move the duplicate check into server.ts loadPolicy() or (better) into a new export parsePolicyRulesWithUniqueIds() in policy.ts so both the server and the validator script use the same code path.
close_reason: Shipped in PR #146 (merge commit 4fb98fa) on 2026-04-22. Closed the ACCESS.md vs server.ts drift surfaced while shipping ccsc-0ss. Added assertUniqueRuleIds() export to policy.ts as a sibling to detectShadowing/detectBroadAutoApprove — throws (not warns) matching the documented fatal-at-boot contract, enumerates every duplicated id sorted+deduped so operators see the full set at once. server.ts loadPolicy() now runs it right after parsePolicyRules() with the same fail-closed shape as the existing parse-error path. scripts/policy-validate.ts swapped its local findDuplicateIds helper for the shared primitive — skill and server now use ONE code path (drift eliminated structurally, not just patched in two places). 4 new tests in server.test.ts cover empty, all-unique, single-duplicate, multi-duplicate-sorted-dedup. Total 682→686 tests, 4,005→4,009 expects, coverage 98.39→98.46% line / 98.75→98.82% function. Gemini's only review comment was a false positive (claimed \\n inside a template literal is literal backslash-n; it isn't — existing parse-error branch uses identical pattern). All 9 CI gates green.

title: TS-aware CRAP / cyclomatic-complexity tool for Walls 5 and 6
description: The /audit-tests skill's crap-score.py uses complexity-report (an older JS-only tool that doesn't parse modern TS). The deep audit (ccsc-ao9) used a regex-based proxy (branches-per-function count) instead, which conflates && / || with real control-flow complexity. A proper Wall 5/6 run needs typhonjs-escomplex or @typescript-eslint/parser wired in. This bd depends on adopting Biome (ccsc-dz8) because Biome's complexity rule would give us a TS-aware number without pulling a new tool.

Wired as a regression gate at --threshold 85 (current ceiling: server.ts anon at 84). Reports max/mean per file + list of functions over threshold. 000-docs/QUALITY_GATES.md gains row 8c. Follow-up bd ccsc-53g tracks refactoring the 4 over-30 functions (gate at 32, handleMessage at 35, two server.ts anons at 39/84) to tighten the threshold to Wall-5 standard.

title: Upstream fix for audit-tests bias-count.sh pipefail+grep-no-match bug
description: The skill's bias-count.sh exits 1 spuriously when grep finds zero matches under 'set -euo pipefail' — grep returns 1 on no-match, pipefail propagates, script dies before printing the summary. Discovered during ccsc-ao9 deep audit. Fix options: (a) grep ... || true in count_pattern, (b) drop pipefail, (c) swap to grep -c which returns 0 and prints 0 on no-match. Doc-only or file upstream issue — Jeremy's call.
acceptance_criteria: bias-count.sh exits 0 on a repo with zero bias markers; fix either lives in-repo (mirror) or upstream in ~/.claude/skills/audit-tests/
close_reason: Shipped in-repo mirror via PR #132 (commit TBD once merged). scripts/bias-count.sh mirrors the skill's bias-count.sh with one divergence: count_pattern + TEST_COUNT + ASSERT_COUNT use `{ grep ... || true; } | wc -l` to swallow grep's exit-1-on-no-match under pipefail. Upstream skill at ~/.claude/skills/audit-tests/scripts/bias-count.sh remains untouched; permission was denied on that edit (Jeremy's call). Verified: bash scripts/bias-count.sh /tmp/empty-dir → exit 0; server.test.ts scan → 1.3% LOW, matches TEST_AUDIT.md.

This bd tracks expanding the Stryker mutate glob after the lib.ts survivors (bd for D2) are cleared — running on three more files at once without first clearing the lib.ts cluster would pair survivor investigation with scope expansion.

close_reason: Shipped in PR #137 (commits 4b5cd77 + cb8f2d9). stryker.conf.mjs mutate array expanded from ['lib.ts'] to ['lib.ts', 'policy.ts', 'manifest.ts', 'journal.ts']. Full 42m43s run at concurrency:4 produced final per-file baselines in 000-docs/MUTATION_REPORT.md: journal.ts 87.76%, lib.ts 84.78%, manifest.ts 92.06%, policy.ts 78.00%, All files 85.22% (1578 killed / 275 survived / 7 timed out of 1860 mutants). Overall above the high:80 threshold. policy.ts below high is documented as a P3 follow-up (warning-message string literals in detectShadowing / detectBroadAutoApprove — behavior covered, text not bit-for-bit asserted).

title: Wire Stryker mutation-score floor into CI (per-PR gate)
description: The 2026-04-20 deep /audit-tests pass (ccsc-ao9) spun up Stryker as a manual-run baseline — config lives in stryker.conf.mjs (Phase E PR, link TBD after merge), baseline score documented in 000-docs/MUTATION_REPORT.md. Not wired into CI because: (a) a single Stryker run takes ~10 min per PR, tripling CI cost; (b) baseline must be stable over ≥3 runs before a threshold is defensible. This bead wires it AFTER the baseline stabilizes. Acceptance: Stryker runs in a separate CI job (parallel to Test), fails the PR if mutation score drops > 5 percentage points below the established baseline on lib.ts/policy.ts/manifest.ts. Evidence expected: 3 consecutive baseline runs producing scores within ±2 points of each other before threshold is set.
design: Two possible mechanics: (a) incremental Stryker via --since=main — only mutates changed files, runs in <2 min on most PRs; (b) full Stryker on main post-merge, post comment on next PR if score dropped. Prefer (a) once Stryker's incremental-mode stability is proven for our setup. Break-threshold recommendation: 5 percentage points below baseline, not the Stryker default of 60% absolute — rewards the current suite's quality without locking us to a specific number that floor-drift later.
notes: Stryker baseline in-flight at bead creation (Phase E still running — mutants at 18% elapsed ~3m, projected completion ~15m total). PR TBD.

title: Adopt Biome as repo-wide lint+format standard
description: The 2026-04-20 deep /audit-tests pass (ccsc-ao9, PR #127) surfaced that the repo has no linter or formatter wired. Running 'bunx @biomejs/biome check .' without a config found 31 errors + 85 warnings + 133 infos across 22 files. Top rules by volume: useLiteralKeys (76), noNonNullAssertion (66), useTemplate (32), useNodejsImportProtocol (22), noExplicitAny (15), organizeImports (6), noControlCharactersInRegex (2). TypeScript strict mode catches correctness; Biome would enforce style + some security lints (noControlCharactersInRegex, noAssignInExpressions). Whether to adopt Biome vs ESLint vs neither is a project-standards call, not an audit finding. If adopting: run 'bunx @biomejs/biome init', auto-fix the safe warnings, review remaining errors, wire as a CI gate after Test in ci.yml. Evidence: 000-docs/QUALITY_GATES.md §7b/§7c, /tmp/audit-run-1776735120/biome-summary.txt.
design: Biome is the leading single-tool lint+format solution for TS in 2026; it's already installed on Jeremy's dev machine (v2.4.12). Alternatives: (a) ESLint + Prettier — two tools, more config; (b) skip — TypeScript strict covers correctness, style is enforced by convention. Recommendation in the audit was Biome, but deferred to Jeremy's call because it's a project-standards decision with churn impact (noNonNullAssertion fires 66 times; useLiteralKeys fires 76 times — these ARE the style the codebase has today). Fixing all style rules = ~250+ LOC diff across every source file. Biome's default config is close to ideal; no custom config should be needed.
notes: Audit evidence: /tmp/audit-run-1776735120/biome-summary.txt + biome.txt. Top rules: useLiteralKeys 76, noNonNullAssertion 66, useTemplate 32, useNodejsImportProtocol 22, noExplicitAny 15, organizeImports 6, noControlCharactersInRegex 2. Tool version tested: @biomejs/biome 2.4.12.
close_reason: Shipped in PR #139 (commit 6ea23b6). Biome adopted with curated rule set (13 rules across correctness/security/suspicious/complexity clusters); all pass bit-for-bit on main. bunx @biomejs/biome check . wired as required CI step. biome.json uses recommended: false baseline — tightening is opt-in per rule cluster (follow-ups ccsc-5vx for formatter, ccsc-ana for rule tightening). Zero code diff on this initial PR. QUALITY_GATES.md §7b/§7c flipped 🔴 → 🟡.

title: Wire dhh.3 post-execution edit when MCP adds a tool-completion signal
description: Original Epic 30-B.3 scope was 'chat.update the receipt with exit code, path, summary' after tool execution. The MCP permission-relay protocol has no tool-completion notification — we send permissions/response allow, Claude executes in its own process space, and no outcome surfaces back through the MCP channel. Shipping a synthesized outcome via proxy heuristics (listen for next Claude action, timer-based 'assumed done') would be less accurate than pointing operators to the authoritative hash-chained journal at ~/.claude/channels/slack/audit.log. Pre-exec receipt (Epic 30-B.2, PR #106) already provides the projection surface; adding invented outcome data would make receipts less trustworthy than they are today. Wire the edit hook when one of these lands: (a) MCP spec adds a tool-completion notification; (b) we relocate tool execution into server.ts proper and observe outcomes directly; (c) operator-facing need demands inventing a lossy status. Supersedes ccsc-dhh.3/.4/.5 which are closed as deferred with this rationale.

notes:

PR #149 opened — https://github.com/jeremylongshore/claude-code-slack-channel/pull/149. All 9 CI gates green locally: 694/694 tests (up from 690), coverage 98.46%/98.82%, crap max 28. Awaiting Typecheck check on main + any review.

Three commits: initial implementation + two Gemini review rounds (🟢 collapsed test assertion to remove non-null assertions, 🟡 separated filter from delete side-effect in round 2; a round-3 🟡 that asked to revert the round-2 change was dismissed as reviewer-churn). 4 new pruneExpired unit tests. title: wire pairing.accepted + pairing.expired journal events
description: Follow-up to PR #94 (B2 journal wiring). Two of the 19 EventKinds were deferred: pairing.accepted (lives in the /slack-channel:access CLI skill, outside the server process — would require an IPC hook or moving pairing acceptance into server.ts) and pairing.expired (pruneExpired() in access-store currently doesn't surface which codes expired — needs refactor to return the expired keys). title: JournalWriter: reverse-chunk read on open() instead of full readFileSync
description: JournalWriter.open() currently reads the entire audit log into memory to recover lastHash/nextSeq from the last line. Per Gemini review on PR #69: this is O(file size) in memory and startup time, won't scale past a handful of MB. Fix: reverse-read in 64KB chunks from end of file until the last newline is found, parse only that line. Epic 30-B rotation (on separate file, not implemented yet) will also mitigate but the in-file scan should be chunked regardless. Low-priority — for a per-developer single-user install, small file sizes keep this fine.
close_reason: Shipped in PR #148 (merge commit on main) on 2026-04-22. Replaced JournalWriter.open() full readFileSync with a 64 KiB reverse-chunk scan from EOF in new module-private readLastLine(fh) helper — memory dropped O(file size) → O(last line size). Unified the prior read-then-fsOpen pair into a single fsOpen('a+', 0o600) handle throughout: reads use explicit position (don't disturb O_APPEND pointer), writes still land atomically at EOF via O_APPEND. Incidentally closes the stat-then-use TOCTOU window flagged by CodeQL js/file-system-race (#22, previously dismissed as out-of-threat-model — now structurally gone). FD safety: recovery-path failure closes the handle before rethrow; close failures now log to stderr with path rather than being silently swallowed (addresses Gemini 🟢 from review). Four new tests covering empty pre-existing file, trailing-newlines-only, tail straddling multiple 64 KiB chunks (1000-event file), and last-line-larger-than-one-chunk (80 KiB correlationId body). Total 686→690 tests, 4,009→4,021 expects. All 9 CI gates green. Coverage 98.46% line / 98.20% func.

title: 31-B.12: Docs — A2A alignment notes

New sub-section in the existing 'Alignment with Google A2A' block documenting the 4-step migration when A2A formalises signed agent-cards: ManifestV2 magic key + signature field → consumer verification (silent drop on bad signature, same as v1 validation) → publisher fallback to v1 for mixed-version channels → v1 deprecation after transition window using the manifest.read journal events to measure residual traffic. Explicit note that advertisements-not-grants, policy.ts import ban, and access.json immutability all continue unchanged through the transition. Actual signing work deferred to a future epic; this note documents that the migration was planned for.

value: v0.7.0 shipped Epic 30-B: per-channel audit projection to Slack threads. ChannelPolicy now has audit field ('off'|'compact'|'full'). Pre-execution receipts posted to originating thread. auditReceipts Map capped at 500 entries for memory safety. Self-echo regression tests locked in (PR #108). Closed issues #29 (policy engine), #30 (threaded action journal), #97 (user_id binding) — all shipped. Next: Epic 31 (bot-manifest protocol, 32 ready beads starting with ccsc-s53.4 P0 invariant).

/beads CTO mode: when user runs /beads or asks what's next, act as CTO — read bd ready, pick the next right thing toward production-grade scalable software, and ASSIGN it (delegate to specialized Agent for audits/research/specialization-heavy work, or claim myself for P0 invariants and security gates). Announce decision, run 'bd update <id> --status in_progress', start. Don't list queues and wait — Jeremy hired Claude to make the call. Goal: international software standards, scales, serves real people.

As of 2026-04-22 late-evening main is at 711a242 — PR #150 merged: pairing.accepted via allowFrom snapshot diff (ccsc-scv closed). Audit EventKind coverage now 19/19 — complete. Design doc 000-docs/audit-journal-architecture.md §pairing-events captures tradeoffs. Test count 704 / 4,035 expects. Coverage 98.47% line / 98.82% func. Remaining backlog: 2 P3s — ccsc-0mn (Stryker CI — needs 3 stable baselines before threshold, currently 1 at 85.22%) and ccsc-4nm (MCP tool-completion signal — externally blocked on MCP spec). No actionable work in the backlog. Session shipped 2 PRs end-to-end: #149 pairing.expired, #150 pairing.accepted. Both review cycles confirmed the CTO lesson — Gemini's first-pass 🟢/🟡 suggestions are usually legitimate; its round-2 reversals (e.g. #149's 'separate filter then merge it back') are reviewer-churn and should be dismissed, not iterated.

Jeremy is a truck driver using Claude to build production-grade software. He cannot supervise at the technical level. Operate with full engineering autonomy: pick the bead, make the design call, claim or delegate, execute. NO trailing confirmation questions ('want me to X or Y?'). Surface decisions only for product/priority/money/legal/user-facing calls — otherwise execute and inform.
